assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: The response includes checking compatibility matrix with 'gcloud container get-server-config' and verifying current Istio version before upgrading to ensure compatibility

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions checking the compatibility matrix and provides commands to verify current Istio version and check GKE 1.32 supported Istio versions

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: The response actually recommends upgrading GKE control plane first, then Istio, rather than checking if Istio needs to be upgraded first for compatibility

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Mentions webhook configuration conflicts as a major gotcha and provides commands to check and fix webhook issues, though doesn't explicitly connect it to node drain/recreation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Includes commands to check sidecar version and provides validation steps for verifying sidecar upgrade after pod restarts

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes monitoring proxy status with 'istioctl proxy-status' and emphasizes monitoring Istio proxy version consistency as part of the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Provides multiple commands including 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands to check Istio components and proxy configuration

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Addresses this through the canary upgrade approach, emphasizes gradual migration, and warns about keeping old and new revisions running for 24-48 hours to avoid disruption
